summary: P2 System Accuracy & Reporting Bug Fixes - All 15 backend tests passed. Verified: P2-8 date utility functions using local timezone, P2-9 profitability report includes purchase_refunds and net_actual_cost fields.
passed_tests: P2-9: Each project includes purchase_refunds field
P2-9: Each project includes net_actual_cost field
P2-9: Profitability report filters work correctly
P2-9: Sorting by actual_cost uses net_actual_cost
P2-8: Date utility functions exist in utils.js (getLocalDateString, formatDateLocal, formatTimeLocal, formatDateTimeLocal)
P2-8: CashBook uses getLocalDateString for selectedDate initialization
P2-8: DailyClosing uses getLocalDateString for selectedDate initialization
P2-8: getLocalDateString uses local date methods (getFullYear, getMonth, getDate) not UTC
P2-9: ProjectProfitabilityReport shows refund indicator when purchase_refunds > 0
critical_code_review_comments: P2-8 Date Fix: getLocalDateString() correctly uses getFullYear(), getMonth(), getDate() for local timezone instead of toISOString() which uses UTC
P2-8 CashBook: selectedDate initialized with getLocalDateString() (line 96), changeDate uses getLocalDateString(current) (line 393)
P2-8 DailyClosing: selectedDate initialized with getLocalDateString() (line 68)
P2-9 Profitability Report Backend: purchase_refunds and net_actual_cost fields added to each project (lines 34674-34675)
P2-9 Profitability Report Backend: total_purchase_refunds and total_net_cost added to summary (lines 34729-34730)
P2-9 Profitability Report Frontend: Net Cost column shows net_actual_cost with refund indicator when purchase_refunds > 0 (lines 397-404)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 fixes verified: Date utility functions in utils.js use local timezone (not UTC). CashBook and DailyClosing pages initialize selectedDate with getLocalDateString(). Profitability report API returns purchase_refunds, net_actual_cost, total_purchase_refunds, total_net_cost fields. Frontend shows Net Cost column with refund indicator.

P2-8_date_timezone_fix.implementation: Uses getFullYear(), getMonth(), getDate() instead of toISOString()

P2-9_profitability_report_purchase_refun.frontend_display: Net Cost column with refund indicator (↓₹X refund)
